markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call to explore a potential content partnership between GrowthX and NCR Voyix.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Problem:** NCR Voyix's lean 2-person team cannot produce enough SEO/GEO content (e.g., blogs) to compete in AI search, publishing only 1–2 articles every 1–2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [**The Solution:** GrowthX offers an end-to-end service using proprietary AI workflows and human experts to scale content production to \~5 articles/week, freeing up the internal team for strategic work.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [**The Offer:** An 8-week, $30k strategy sprint to prove value by delivering 10–20 articles and a roadmap before committing to a 12-month retainer (est. $15k–$18k/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [**The Rationale:** GrowthX provides a ready-made, proven solution, saving NCR Voyix the time and resources needed to build its own complex AI content engine.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)

## Topics

### NCR Voyix's Content Challenge

  - [**Context:** NCR Voyix is a smaller, more focused company following a split from NCR.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [**Team:** A lean 2-person team manages all content, not just blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [**Production:** Currently zero blog posts due to focus on other priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [**Agency Silos:** Multiple agencies handle specific content types (website build, PR) but none focus on ongoing SEO/GEO content.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**AI Adoption:** Internal use is elementary; legal/procurement hurdles block advanced marketing AI tools.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [**Goal:** Improve performance in all search types (SEO, GEO, AEO, TEO, LLMs) via a new content partner.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solution

  - [**Model:** An end-to-end service combining proprietary AI workflows with human experts.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
    1.  [**Context Engineering:** GrowthX uses client resources (ICP docs, brand guides) to build internal "artifacts" that inform its AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
    2.  [**AI-Powered Drafting:** Workflows generate initial drafts, briefs, and research.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
    3.  [**Human Refinement:** A 60+ person team of SEO/content experts refines drafts for brand voice and accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [**Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
      - [**Fact-Checking:** AI validates every passage; editors review suggested rewrites for low-confidence claims.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
      - [**Content Refresh:** Proactive refresh of existing content every \~3 months to maintain relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
      - [**Publishing:** Handles staging and publishing directly in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
      - [**LLM Visibility:** Monitors content performance in AI answers to inform strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

### Partnership Model & Pricing

  - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint**](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [**Cost:** $30,000](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [**Duration:** 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
          - [Context artifacts (brand, audience, company)](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
          - [10–20 published articles](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
          - [A content roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [**Phase 2: 12-Month Retainer**](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [**Cost:** Estimated $15,000–$18,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
      - [**Term:** 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [**Decision Point:** NCR Voyix can opt out after Phase 1.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Shawnessy:** Review case studies and prepare questions on performance KPIs for a follow-up call.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [**Golden Gate:** Send case studies to Shawnessy.](https://fathom.video/share/fzP6snxJEC4513br-oJibFnM3fs8m2eA?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
